description: Fillable worksheet that walks you through GRI 1 to 6 for one product and records the heading and reasoning.
name: HTS Classification Worksheet

description: One-page guide for composite goods and sets: list components, weigh essential character, write the call you can defend.
name: Essential Character Decision Sheet

description: Template to record the rulings you found, the headings they cover, and how they support your classification file.
name: CROSS Ruling Research Log

description: Step-by-step worksheet for tariff shift and regional value content with a bill-of-materials table to fill in.
name: USMCA Rule-of-Origin Worksheet

description: Blank certification with field-by-field notes covering origin criterion, responsible party, and blanket period.
name: USMCA Certification of Origin Template

description: Spreadsheet that runs both transaction value and net cost on the same product so you can compare the result.
name: Regional Value Content Calculator

description: Printable checklist of all ISF elements, who provides each, and the deadline before vessel lading.
name: ISF 10+2 Checklist

description: Annotated walkthrough of every box on the 7501 so you understand what you attest to when you file.
name: Entry Summary (7501) Field Guide

description: Tracker for the import, manufacture, and export records a drawback claim needs to survive CBP review.
name: Duty Drawback Recordkeeping Tracker

description: Worksheet to add assists, royalties, packing, and commissions to transaction value and land at dutiable value.
name: Customs Valuation Build-Up Sheet

description: Lay out base duty, Section 301, and any special program in the right order for a single HTS line.
name: Section 301 Duty Stacking Worksheet

description: Twelve-week study schedule with the regulation parts to cover each week before the customs broker exam.
name: Broker Exam Study Planner

description: Where to place your tabs so you flip straight to the answer under exam time pressure.
name: HTSUS and 19 CFR Tabbing Guide

description: Worked classification problems with full reasoning, not just the letter answer. Do them closed-book first.
name: Practice Question Set: Classification

description: Worked valuation problems covering assists, related-party pricing, and additions to value.
name: Practice Question Set: Valuation

description: One-page card showing where risk transfers and who handles export and import formalities for each term.
name: Incoterms 2020 Quick Reference Card

description: Plain-English definitions of the terms in every entry, formatted to print and keep at your desk.
name: Trade Compliance Glossary (Printable)

description: Outline for a prior disclosure letter to CBP, with the elements that make mitigation more likely.
name: Prior Disclosure Drafting Template

description: Reference sheet for how long to keep entry records and supporting documents under the regulations.
name: Recordkeeping Retention Schedule

description: Run every incoming invoice against this list before you classify or file. Catches the vague descriptions early.
name: Commercial Invoice Review Checklist

description: Quick guidance on when and how goods must be marked, and the common ways importers get it wrong.
name: Country of Origin Marking Cheat Sheet

description: Template to organize a PSC: what changed, why, the new figures, and the supporting basis.
name: Post-Summary Correction Filing Template
